creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
^Triage: 

- Reporter is committer, assign accordingly (if only for future coordination on re-open)
- Close (OBE) based on comment 3

If this is still an issue in latest 11.3 / 12.0 / releng/12.1, supported stable/X branches or current, please re-open the issue with additional details.

If commit(s) can be identified that resolved this issue specifically, Assignee should be set to committer that resolved (and mfc-* flags set to what branches received the fix)
